properties.Notes: Andover Is Zoned Entirely As One District And Therefore Does not Have A Zoning Map.
Baltimore Has Just One Zoning District And Therefore No Zoning Map.
All Dimensional Standards Default to Those Of The Underlying District.

"Uses Allowed As A Permitted Or Conditional Use In The Underlying Zoning District Require The Approval Of The Development Review Board As A Conditional Use In Accordance With Section 260 And The Supplemental District Standards Set Forth Below" (Page 45).
Adu Height Maximum: 25ft; Parking Spaces: "Recreation: As Required By The Development Review Board" (Page 50).

Parking Spaces: "Recreation: As Required By The Development Review Board" (Page 50). "The Jackson Gore Recreational District Shall Include 165.84 Acres. This District Provides For 326
Residential Dwelling Units, 8 Non-Residential Buildings Including A Recreation/Health Center" (Page 42).

Adus Are Noted As Prohibited Because "Accessory Apartments" (Which Refer to Adus In The Zoning Code) Are not Listed As Permitted Or Conditional Use. No Minimum Lot Area Specified, But For Single- And Two-Family Dwellings, The Acreage For Density Are Listed. Lot Coverage Is "Not to Exceed 2,500 Sqft Total Footprint" (Page 31).
Accessory Building Height Maximum: 25ft; No Minimum Lot Area Specified, But For Single- And Two-Family Dwellings, The Acreage For Density Are Listed.
Accessory Building Height Maximum: 25ft; No Minimum Lot Area Specified, But For Single- And Two-Family Dwellings, The Acreage For Density Are Listed.

The Maximum Density For This Overlay Is 1 Lot Per 25 Acres With A Minimum Lot Size Of 5 Acres. All Proposals Are Reviewed By The Vermont Fish And Wildlife Department to Ensure Building Does not Impact The Deer Wintering Habitat Or The Wildlife Travel Corridor.

Uses Allowed As A Permitted Or Conditional Use In The Underlying Zoning District Require The Approval Of The Planning Commission In This Overlay Except Agriculture/Forestry And Small Accessory Structures Or Additions to Existing Structures.

The Number Of Dwelling Units Allowed In The Planned Residential Development Shall not Exceed 125 Percent Of The Number Which, In The Development Review Board's Judgment, Could Be Developed On The Parcel In Conformance With The Land Use Development Regulations For The District In Which The Development Is Located.

The Number Of Dwelling Units Allowed In The Planned Residential Development Shall not Exceed 125 Percent Of The Number Which, In The Development Review Board's Judgment, Could Be Developed On The Parcel In Conformance With The Land Use Development Regulations For The District In Which The Development Is Located.
Altering A Single-Family Home to A Two-Family One Is A Permitted Use That Does not Require Conditional Use Approval.

Altering A Single-Family Home to A Two-Family One Is A Permitted Use That Does not Require Conditional Use Approval. It Is not Explicitly Said If Two-Family Homes Are Permitted With Conditional Use, But It Is Possible to Apply For "Other Uses" Under Conditional Use So Long As They Are Characterizable As Similar to Uses Otherwise Conditionally Permitted/Permitted. Given That Two-Family Alterations Are Permitted, It Reasons That A New Two-Family Construction Would Be Characterizable As Such.
Altering A Single-Family Home to A Two-Family One Is A Permitted Use That Does not Require Conditional Use Approval. However, New Constructions Of Two-Family Homes Are not Permitted.

Given That Two-Family Alterations Are Permitted, It Reasons That A New Two-Family Construction Would Be Characterizable As Such.

It Is not Explicitly Said If Two-Family Homes Are Permitted With Conditional Use, But It Is Possible to Apply For "Other Uses" Under Conditional Use So Long As They Are Characterizable As Similar to Uses Otherwise Conditionally Permitted/Permitted. The Only Permissible Dwellings Are Single And Two Family Dwellings That Are Part Of An Approved Pud.
This District Has 3 Classes: (1) Municipal Sewer And Municipal Or Public Water (2) Municipal Sewer And Individual Water (3) Individual Sewer And Individual, Municipal, Or Public Water
This District Consists Of Two Subdistricts, Res-25 And Res-10, Which Will Be Listed As Alternatives In That Order For The Following Dimensional Standards.
